title: Kordisen Nonstick Griddle Pan for Induction Hob, 28cm Square Grill Pan for Indoor Cooking, Granite Coating Steak Skillet with Pour Spouts, PFOA Free
features: 【Health and Non-Stick Technology】: Elevate your cooking with the pinnacle of health using our cookware featuring cutting-edge non-stick technology. Verified by SGS and entirely free of PFOA and PFOS, ensuring a health-conscious cooking process.

【Effortless Cleaning】: Our non-stick coating not only prevents food from sticking to the surface but also simplifies the cleaning process. Wipe it with a paper towel or rinse with water for a time-saving and delightful kitchen experience.

【Versatile Culinary Companion】: Ideal for various cooking styles, whether frying, simmering, baking, or deep-frying, our small grill pan is your versatile kitchen assistant. Suitable for both indoor and outdoor use, seamlessly adapting to any cooking environment.

【Even Heating with Smart Pouring】: The high magnetic conductive stainless steel base ensures even and rapid heat distribution. The raised ridges create perfect grill marks while efficiently directing excess fat to the sides. The dual tilted spouts make pouring a breeze, enhancing cooking efficiency.

【Customer Satisfaction Guarantee】: Our commitment is to quality, with service as our top priority. Our professional customer support team is ready to assist you. If any issues arise, we offer a worry-free replacement service. Trust us for a satisfying cooking experience.
description: Product Description The Steak Lover’s Cooking Companion: Nonstick Grilling Pan Easily release your favorite cuts of meat and enjoy the juicy tenderness of a perfectly grilled steak! The premium non-stick surface lets you say goodbye to scrubbing away stubborn residue while giving you a healthier, more enjoyable home cooking experience. Previous page Next page 1 UNIFORM HEATING 2 EASY TO CLEAN High magnetic conductive base Designed for optimal heat distribution and durability, ensuring perfect cooking results every time. Bakelite handle The handle is comfortable to hold and cool to the touch while providing a secure grip for easy lifting and precise manipulation. Double tilt spout Dual angled spouts drain excess fat and liquid easily and prevent splashing. Ridged surface Raised ribs leave perfect grill marks and prevent excess oil from contacting food for restaurant-quality flavor. Yes, the non-stick coating used on this non-stick baking sheet is PFOA and PFOS free, ensuring safe and healthy cooking. Can I use this skillet on an induction cooktop? Yes, this skillet is compatible with induction, gas, electric and ceramic hobs. Can I use the grill pan to cook other types of food besides steak? Absolutely! Our non-stick grill pan is a versatile cooking tool for a wide variety of foods, including burgers, chicken, fish, vegetables and more. How do I clean my non-stick skillet? Our baking sheets have a high quality non-stick coating and are very easy to clean. After use, allow it to cool slightly and wipe with paper towels or rinse with water for a time-saving and enjoyable kitchen experience. Can I use the non-stick grill pan on my outdoor grill? Of course you can. Our non-stick grill pans are suitable for both indoor and outdoor use, seamlessly adapting to any cooking environment.
